email_subject: Sollicitatie — Government Relations & ESG Engagement Communications Intern
email_body:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Government Relations & ESG Engagement Communications bij Nestlé Zone Europe in Brussel. Mijn achtergrond in digitale marketing, contentcreatie en webontwikkeling sluit goed aan bij de communicatie- en evenementenondersteuning die deze rol vraagt.

In mijn huidige functie bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data, social media-integratie en het monitoren van online prestaties. Ik ben creatief met tools zoals Canva en Adobe, en ik werk gestructureerd onder deadlines.

Hoewel mijn ervaring in EU Public Affairs nog groeit, heb ik een sterke interesse in duurzaamheidsthema's zoals circulaire economie en regeneratieve landbouw. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief via cursussen.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn digitale vaardigheden in te zetten voor de communicatiedoelen van Nestlé. Hartelijk dank voor uw overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Government Relations & ESG Engagement Communications Internship at Nestlé Zone Europe in Brussels. My background in digital marketing, content creation, and web development aligns well with the communication and event support this role requires.

In my current role at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data, social media integration, and monitoring online performance. I am creative with tools like Canva and Adobe, and I work in a structured manner under deadlines.

Although my experience in EU Public Affairs is still growing, I have a strong interest in sustainability topics such as circular economy and regenerative agriculture. My B1 Dutch is improving actively through courses.

I look forward to applying my digital skills to Nestlé's communication goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Government Relations & ESG Engagement Communications Intern bij Nestlé Zone Europe in Brussel. Uw oproep voor een creatieve, digitaal onderlegde stagiair met oog voor communicatie en evenementen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

Momenteel werk ik als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto, waar ik verantwoordelijk ben voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-websites met Elementor en Astra. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), social media-integratie (Instagram/Facebook) en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze vaardigheden zijn direct toepasbaar op het ontwikkelen van communicatiematerialen en het monitoren van online conversaties.

U zoekt iemand met ervaring in evenementenmanagement en projectmanagement. Hoewel mijn formele ervaring in evenementen beperkt is, heb ik bij Episto en via mirook.com geleerd om projecten gestructureerd en proactief aan te pakken, met oog voor detail en deadlines. Ik ben creatief met Canva en Adobe-tools (Photoshop, InDesign) en maak dynamische visuals en video's. Mijn interesse in EU Public Affairs en duurzaamheidsthema's zoals circulaire economie en regeneratieve landbouw motiveert me om bij te dragen aan de communicatiedoelen van Nestlé.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve cursussen). Ik ben flexibel, leergierig en werk graag in een internationaal team. Ik hoop mijn digitale en communicatieve vaardigheden te kunnen inzetten voor Nestlé.

Hartelijk dank voor uw tijd en overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Government Relations & ESG Engagement Communications Internship at Nestlé Zone Europe in Brussels. Your call for a creative, digitally savvy intern with an eye for communication and events aligns perfectly with my profile.

Currently, I work as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, where I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress websites with Elementor and Astra. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema), social media integration (Instagram/Facebook), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. These skills are directly applicable to developing communication materials and monitoring online conversations.

You are looking for someone with experience in event management and project management. Although my formal event experience is limited, at Episto and through mirook.com I have learned to approach projects in a structured and proactive manner, with attention to detail and deadlines. I am creative with Canva and Adobe tools (Photoshop, InDesign) and create dynamic visuals and videos. My interest in EU Public Affairs and sustainability topics such as circular economy and regenerative agriculture motivates me to contribute to Nestlé's communication goals.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active courses). I am flexible, eager to learn, and enjoy working in an international team. I hope to apply my digital and communication skills for Nestlé.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Digital content creation: writing SEO blog content, designing visuals with Canva/Adobe, and creating dynamic videos/GIFs.
- Social media integration and monitoring: managed Instagram/Facebook for mirook.com, tracked online conversations.
- Event and project management support: structured, proactive approach with tight deadlines; experience coordinating multiple workstreams.
- Technical SEO and analytics: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs — data-driven communication decisions.
- Interest in EU Affairs and sustainability: motivated to learn about circular economy, regenerative agriculture, and advocacy.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, dynamic visuals and videos (Canva, Adobe Photoshop, InDesign)
- Social media: social media content & integration, monitoring online conversations, LinkedIn advocacy
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, AI-assisted content tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
